name: czrecoilframe_init_fallback_mode
description: CZRecoilFrame::InitFallbackMode selects software rendering, clears acceleration/fullscreen options, restores the fallback video mode, and refreshes command UI state.
known_limits: The smoke verifies persisted option writes, software hardware-mode selection, fallback view-section dimensions, and command UI state.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for exact member-call shape.
